mapper.update: UPDATE workflow_job SET task_id = #{taskId}, requested_stage = #{requestedStage}, job_type = #{jobType}, job_status = #{jobStatus}, requested_by = #{requestedBy}, request_payload_json = #{requestPayloadJson}, start_time = #{startTime}, finish_time = #{finishTime}, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, trace_id = #{traceId}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE job_id = #{jobId}
mapper.select: SELECT job_id, task_id, requested_stage, job_type, job_status, requested_by, request_payload_json, start_time, finish_time, error_code, error_message, trace_id, create_time, update_time FROM workflow_job WHERE job_id = #{jobId}

SELECT job_id, task_id, requested_stage, job_type, job_status, requested_by, request_payload_json, start_time, finish_time, error_code, error_message, trace_id, create_time, update_time FROM workflow_job WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY create_time ASC

SELECT job_id, task_id, requested_stage, job_type, job_status, requested_by, request_payload_json, start_time, finish_time, error_code, error_message, trace_id, create_time, update_time FROM workflow_job WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND job_status IN ('PENDING', 'RUNNING') ORDER BY create_time ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT job_id, task_id, requested_stage, job_type, job_status, requested_by, request_payload_json, start_time, finish_time, error_code, error_message, trace_id, create_time, update_time FROM workflow_job WHERE job_status IN ('PENDING', 'RUNNING') ORDER BY create_time ASC
